entity.label: Quartus
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: Fourth, a Corinthian Christian who sent by Paul his salutations to friends at Rome (Rom. 16:23).

nodes.label: Quartus
nodes.description: Fourth, a Corinthian Christian who sent by Paul his salutations to friends at Rome (Rom. 16:23).

verses.text: Gaius mine host, and of the whole church, saluteth you. Erastus the chamberlain of the city saluteth you, and Quartus a brother.
